CreateAdditionalNode.description: Grants permission to create an additional node

CreateDeployment.description: Grants permission to create a deployment

CreateSettingsSet.description: Grants permission to create an application settings set

DeleteAdditionalNode.description: Grants permission to delete an additional node

DeleteApp.description: Grants permission to delete an application

DeleteDeployment.description: Grants permission to delete a deployment

DeleteSettingsSet.description: Grants permission to delete a settings set

DescribeAdditionalNode.description: Grants permission to describe an additional node

DescribeProvisionedApp.description: Grants permission to describe provisioning applications

DescribeProvisioningEvents.description: Grants permission to describe provisioning events

DescribeSettingsSet.description: Grants permission to describe an application settings set

GetDeployment.description: Grants permission to get a deployment

GetDeploymentPatternVersion.description: Grants permission to get a version of a deployment pattern

GetInfrastructureSuggestion.description: Grants permission to get infrastructure suggestion

GetIpAddress.description: Grants permission to get customer's ip address

GetResourceCostEstimate.description: Grants permission to get resource cost estimate

GetResourceRecommendation.description: Grants permission to get  recommendation for a resource

GetSettingsSet.description: Grants permission to get a settings set

GetWorkload.description: Grants permission to get a workload

GetWorkloadAsset.description: Grants permission to get a workload's asset

GetWorkloadAssets.description: Grants permission to get workload assets

GetWorkloadDeploymentPattern.description: Grants permission to get a deployment pattern

ListAdditionalNodes.description: Grants permission to list additional nodes

ListAllowedResources.description: Grants permission to list the allowed resources

ListDeploymentEvents.description: Grants permission to list the events that occured during a deployment

ListDeploymentPatternVersions.description: Grants permission to list the versions of a deployment pattern

ListProvisionedApps.description: Grants permission to list provisioning applications

ListResourceCostEstimates.description: Grants permission to list the cost estimates of resources

ListSettingsSets.description: Grants permission to list settings sets

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a LaunchWizard resource

ListWorkloadDeploymentOptions.description: Grants permission to list deployment options of a given workload

ListWorkloadDeploymentPatterns.description: Grants permission to list the deployment patterns of a workload

PutSettingsSet.description: Grants permission to create a settings set

StartProvisioning.description: Grants permission to start a provisioning

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a LaunchWizard resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a LaunchWizard resource

UpdateDeployment.description: Grants permission to update a deployment

UpdateSettingsSet.description: Grants permission to update an application settings set

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
